title: Loot Bags And Crates
description: a final dimension for all of modded minecraft (80+ optional mod integrations)
body:
a looting adventure like you have never seen
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66e2ed0311fb0321f70bb02462deba60bbb419a0.png)

ever felt like there was no closure to a modpack you played or the endgame was simply to short.

This mod tries to end all the troubles you have about your endgame expireience in large modpacks.

 

the main thing this mod introduces is a dimension (the looting dimension) it consists of a starting room from where you can open doors (doorlock blocks) with looting keys and there will generate a new room in its place.

There are currently 9 diffrent rooms (including the starting room) that can generate in this new dimension!!

But this is not all, you probally noticed that i pointed a few times out that this mod is intended to be played in large modpacks with a large amount of other populair mods in it. This is becouse although the mod can be played in vanilla minecraft the content in the rooms changes if there are specific mods installed, so maybe if you install "supplementaries" there will generate a grandfather clock in one of the rooms or with "create" there are a bunch of machine parts scattered around.

If you thought that the content list would end here i also made sure to make a special chest with loot from 50+ populair mods. So the more of these mods you have installed the more loot there will generate in the chests.

I also added 3 new monsters exclusive to the dimension and a bunch of loot containers, a structure in the end and a new resource  the looting essence found in all vinilla minecraft structures with chests, be sure to pick these up you will need them!!

diffrent loot containers:

-the loot bags. these can be obtained from undead, arth ropods and you yourself dying.

-the loot dirt and loot endstone. the loot dirt spawn in the overworld and gives realy early game loot.

-coins and lucky well. the coins can be right clicked on the lucky well to recieve loot.

-the trash bag. gives mostly mob drops as loot.

-mystical barrel. gives loot out of populair magic mods

-the mechanical scraps, lost technologies and alien waste. give loot out of populair tech mods. 

 

you can leave the dimensin by pressing the "left alt key" and the "L key"

geckolib is required

use jei for special information and crafting recipes on items from this mod

 

This mod also helps modpack creators in giving players rewards in the form of loot crates for populair tech mods like Create,  Mekanism and Powah.

to structures from:

 

 only vanilla at the moment

 

 

crates can not be obtained in survival instead they need to be given in modpack quests or loot chest.

the crates only give items when the corect mod is installed. other wise no rewards will be given (it says wich mod in the name of the crate).

feel free to use this mod in your modpacks.

You can also use this mod as a base for your structure mod that you can easily make with the new  and inproved structure generation from mcreator. you can place the loot blocks out of this mod in your own structure so that your structure has a lot of diffrent ways of looting.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e1af1dcc6d49e09da6771f90527e4a7cd02b3f5.png)       

this mod is made with mcreator

 

ideas are always welcome!!
